Rule 10B. Aadhaar authentication for registered persons

(1) The applicant shall comply with the following requirements.

(b) the applicant shall furnish the following details [1].

(i) bank account details.

(ii) sub-section (6D) of section 25 compliance reference.

(iii) address proof.

(iv) any other document.

Table 1 - Documents
DocumentReference
(1)(2)
PassportIdentity proof
Utility billAddress proof

[1] Inserted vide Notification No. 16/2020-Central Tax, dated 23.03.2020 and brought into force w.e.f. 01.04.2020 vide Notification No. 25/2020-Central Tax, dated 01.04.2020.
